creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: delphij->freebsd-ports

Return this back to pool.  I have concerns over the patch since it 
removed support of various databases, but no longer uses the libdbi 
port so I don't think I'm in a good position to make decisions. 

Please let me know if you are willing to maintain this port so I can 
commit the patch and put you on the MAINTAINER line.
